task_description: Enhance the Career Lab Consulting Python Evaluation System with: 1000-question bank based on AI Agent Development curriculum, webcam camera requirement with eye contact detection, 1-minute per-question timer with auto-advance, admin panel in footer, AI reshuffling of questions, and bug fixes.

verification.summary: All 27 tests pass. Docker image builds successfully. 1000-question bank verified with 18 topics. Config updated to 25-min duration. Camera/eye detection JS files created. Admin panel in footer confirmed.
